seasonBlock.name: 2026 International Placement Season
seasonBlock.description: Submit applications for verified overseas roles during the official placement window. Early applicants receive priority document review.

processBlock.title: Your path from application to arrival
processBlock.description: A clear nine-step timeline designed for international candidates.

1.title: Create Account
1.description: Register in minutes and secure your candidate workspace.

2.title: Complete Profile
2.description: Add experience, credentials, and preferred destinations.

3.title: Apply
3.description: Submit to verified roles matched to your strengths.

4.title: Document Review
4.description: Our team validates certificates and eligibility files.

5.title: Employer Review
5.description: Shortlisted applications are reviewed by hiring partners.

6.title: Interview
6.description: Prepare with coaches and meet employers virtually.

7.title: Offer Letter
7.description: Receive and review your international employment offer.

8.title: Visa Preparation
8.description: Get structured support for sponsorship and filings.

9.title: Travel
9.description: Final relocation guidance before you depart.

1.quote: Global Jobs International helped me secure a job abroad. The advisors were responsive and honest every step of the way.

2.quote: I found a verified tech role in Dublin within weeks. The process felt premium, organised, and genuinely supportive.

3.quote: From interview prep to contract review, the team helped me land a leadership role in Dubai with confidence.

premiumBlock.liveNetworkDesc: Floating destination flags and open vacancy counts across our active markets.

premiumBlock.visaDesc: Live-style feed of recent processing milestones.

about.title: About Global Jobs International
body: Global Jobs International connects skilled and entry-level professionals with verified overseas employers across more than 100 countries.
Our recruitment teams coordinate applications, documents, interviews, visas, and travel so candidates and employers share one trusted workflow.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
body: How do I apply? Create an account, browse jobs, and complete the application wizard with required documents.
Do you guarantee a visa? No. We guide the process carefully, but visa decisions remain with immigration authorities.
What if I do not have a CV? Our CV preparation service can create a professional CV charged in your country of residence currency.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
body: We collect account, application, and document data solely to operate recruitment services.
We do not sell personal data. Access is limited to authorized GJI staff, employers (pipeline summaries only), and processors required to deliver services.

terms.title: Terms of Use
body: By using Global Jobs International you agree to provide accurate information and use the platform for lawful recruitment purposes only.
Job offers, visas, and employment outcomes are not guaranteed and depend on employer decisions and immigration rules.

refund.title: Refund Policy
body: CV preparation and paid service fees are generally non-refundable once work has started.
If a payment error occurs, contact support within 7 days with your receipt and application number.

cookies.title: Cookies
body: We use essential cookies for authentication, theme preference, and session security.
Analytics cookies help us improve page performance; you can control non-essential cookies in your browser settings.
